tasks.dev: cd ../.. && pnpm exec concurrently -k -n web,server -c blue,green "pnpm exec vp dev --config apps/web/vite.config.ts" "cd apps/web && pnpm exec nitro dev"
tasks.build: cd ../.. && pnpm exec vp build --config apps/web/vite.config.ts && cd apps/web && NITRO_PRESET=deno_deploy pnpm exec nitro build
